Parameter distribution in the final population — bypass network

A grid of EDA runs. For any configuration, over the final population (400 individuals), the distribution of every parameter — each cell of the CPTs and of the utility table. Histogram width = the parameter's uncertainty; the green line is the network's true value. Well-pinned parameters → narrow histogram on the green line; degenerate parameters → wide or shifted.

Influence diagram — uncertainty map

Shape = node type (ellipse = chance, rectangle = decision, diamond = utility). Fill = mean uncertainty of its parameters (light = recovered, dark = degenerate). Click a node for its histograms.

low → high uncertainty
chance
decision
utility
Select a node

Click a node in the diagram to see the distribution of each of its parameters.
